title: DEAL's Legendaries
description: A Cobblemon Resource/Data Pack to add our own takes on models and spawns for Legendary & Mythical Pokemon.
body:
This is a growing Cobblemon Resource/Data Pack created by me and a pal of mine which aims to add models and spawns for Legendary & Mythical Pokemon.

Currently Adds:
- Genesect
- Celebi
- Darkrai
- Mewtwo
